# Work item template (markdown)

**Title:** `[Work]: <short summary>`

**Labels:** `status: backlog` + area label

---

## Kanban

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Column | Backlog / Ready / In progress / Review / Done |
| Priority | Low / Medium / High |
| Area | shiritori-online / kawaii-shiritori / shiritori_flutter / CI/CD / Dictionary / Solo / Infra / Other |

## Description

What needs to be done?

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests / docs updated if applicable

## Branch (optional)

`feature/<slug>`

## Links

- Blocks #
- Blocked by #
- Related PR #

---

**Hashtags:** #work-item #kanban
